ideas.name: auto-switch-embed-rerank-gpu
ideas.author: Vehir
ideas.description: Unified GPU daemon for both embeddings and MSA rerank — manages Qwen3-Embedding-4B as always-on worker and MSA-4B as on-demand spawned worker with automatic model switching

edges.author: Vehir
edges.description: Wraps MSA-4B rerank model loaded on demand via a spawned worker process for neural rescoring of retrieval results

edges.author: Vehir
edges.description: Wraps Qwen3-Embedding-4B model running as a resident embed worker for always-on dense vector generation

edges.author: Vehir
edges.description: Reads and writes memory entries through the db client library for vector data during embedding and reranking operations

program_edges.author: Vehir
program_edges.description: Unified daemon spawns MSA-4B worker for neural rescoring

program_edges.author: Vehir
program_edges.description: Unified daemon runs Qwen3-Embedding-4B as resident embed worker

program_edges.author: Vehir
program_edges.description: Unified daemon reads and writes memory entries via db client
